checked.note: verified in a running system - human visual check 2026-07-21: the Products list renders the 11 rows with their Quantity counters (display-only app, no interaction to exercise).

deviations.what: headerLevel="H2" on the List (since UI5 1.117) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.117 to render it.
